command: Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera.
Record for 10 seconds with the meeting room recorder and save it as test.wav.
Sound a fire siren on the farm.
Play the "Golden.mp3" file through the speaker in the playroom.
Close all windows in the living room.
Open all blinds in Sector2.
Lock all safes with odd tags in Sector B.
Close everything in Sector2.
Lower all even-tagged blinds in the bedroom.
Stop all robot vacuum cleaners on the 3rd floor.
Set all dehumidifiers in the office to dehumidify mode.
Set all dehumidifiers in the lab to AI drying mode.
Lock all door locks in the storage.
Open all even-tagged valves in the kitchen.
Turn off all lights in the bedroom.
Set all air conditioners in the office to cool mode.
Close all blinds in the living room.
Open all windows on floor 1.
Sound all sirens on floor 2 in emergency mode.
Lock all door locks in sector 1.
Set all air purifiers in the warehouse to high mode.
Stop playback on all speakers in the meeting room.
Set all humidifiers in the bedroom to auto mode.
Close all valves in the garage.
Set all pumps in the factory to maximum mode.
Set all robot vacuum cleaners with even tags to auto mode.
Set the target temperature of the air conditioner in Sector1 to 18 degrees.
Change the air purifier in the bedroom to sleep mode.
Close all valves in the kitchen.
If the charger is fully charged, turn off the charger.
If the button is in the pushed state, raise the blind.
If the shade is 30% or less open, set it to 50%.
If the sound sensor level in livingroom is over 50, stop the speaker.
If the air conditioner in livingroom is in cool mode, switch it to auto mode.
If any presence sensor in the house is currently in the detected state, set the siren to emergency mode.
If the contact sensor at the entrance is in detected state, sound the emergency siren.
If it is raining, set all dehumidifiers in the house to drying mode.
If the temperature in sector 1 is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the target temperature to 30.
If the carbon dioxide concentration in the farm is 800ppm or higher, sound the emergency siren.
If the temperature in the bedroom is 36.5 degrees or higher, set the bedroom air conditioner to 30 degrees.
If all temperature sensors in sector 1 read 35 degrees or higher, set all air conditioners in sector 1 to cool mode.
If the sector 1 temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the sector 1 air conditioner target temperature to 22 degrees.
If the living room illuminance is below 50 lux, turn on the living room light.
If no one is present in the office, turn off the office air conditioner.
If the baby room sound is 60dB or higher, say "The baby is crying" through the living room speaker.
If the face recognized at the entrance is 'visitor', start streaming from the entrance camera.
If any door lock in sector 1 is open, sound the sector 1 siren in police mode.
If any indoor Group1 humidity sensor reads 60% or higher, set all indoor Group1 dehumidifiers to drying mode.
If the living room temperature is at least 26C, turn on the living room AC plug; otherwise turn it off.
If the bedroom illuminance is at most 100 lux, turn on the bedroom floor lamp plug; otherwise turn it off.
If the bedroom door is open, turn off the bedroom air purifier plug; otherwise turn it on.
If the outdoor very fine dust level is 15 or higher, sound the emergency siren.
If the charger current is 10 amperes or above, sound the emergency siren.
If someone is in the living room and smoke is being detected in the kitchen, announce 'Smoke has been detected in the kitchen' through the living room speaker and close the kitchen valve.

base_joi.name: Scenario

joi.name: Scenario
Scenario
Scenario

command: If the weather is rainy and no one is being detected, lock the door and close the valve.
If the noise level is 80 or higher and no person is being detected, stop speaker playbackand sound the emergency siren.
If the carbon dioxide is 1500ppm or higher and the blind is closed, set the air purifier to auto and raise the blind.
If the temperature is 18 degrees or below and someone is detected, set the air conditioner to heat mode and 22 degrees.
If it is raining and the door is open, close the door and set the dehumidifier to internal Care mode.
If a person is detected and smoke is detected, sound the siren in fire mode and announce "Evacuate" through the speaker.
If the pressure is 100 or higher and no one is home, close the valve and sound emergency siren.
If no motion is detected but the door is open, take a photo and output "Warning" through the speaker.
If the study carbon dioxide is 1000ppm or higher and the air purifier is in sleep mode, switch to auto mode and say "Switching the air purifier to auto mode" through the speaker.

base_joi.name: Scenario

joi.name: Scenario
Scenario
Scenario

command: If the bedroom temperature is 26 degrees or higher and the bedroom window is open, close the window and turn on the air conditioner.
If the bathroom humidity is 85% or higher and the bathroom door is closed, turn on the light and open the door.
If the face ID 'family' is recognized at the entrance and the door lock is locked , unlock the door lock and open the door.
If it is raining and the living room window is open, close the window and set the dehumidifier to dehumidifying mode.
If the server room temperature is 30 degrees or higher and the AC is off, turn it on and sound the main emergency siren.
If the wine cellar temperature is 15 degrees or higher and humidity is 60% or higher, turn on the air conditioner and turn off the humidifier.
If a water leak is detected in the basement and the main valve is open, close all main valves and sound the police siren.

base_joi.name: Scenario

Scenario

command: If the warehouse fine dust level is 100 or higher and the air purifier is in auto mode, switch it to high mode and say through the warehouse speaker "Switching to high mode".

joi.name: Scenario

command: If the living room light is on and the illuminance is 50 lux or higher, close the living room blind and set the AC to auto mode.
If the temperature is 28 degrees or higher and the humidity is 70% or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode and 24 degrees.
If it is raining and the humidity is 80% or higher, set the dehumidifier to drying mode and output "It's raining and himidity is high" through the speaker.

command: If the noise level is 70 or higher and no one is home, take a photo with the camera and sound the police siren.
If the illuminance is 100 lux or lower and a person is being detected, set the speaker volume to 30 and play relax.mp3 music.
If the fine dust level is 150 or higher and the door is open, close the door and set the air purifier to high.
If living room illuminance is at most 200 lux, set the living room light to 100% brightness; if at least 500 lux, set it to 30%; otherwise set it to 60%.
If the living room temperature is at most 18C or the bedroom temperature is at most 18C, turn on the living room heater plug.
If the bedroom illuminance is at most 100 lux, set the bedroom light to 100% brightness; else if it is at most 300 lux, set it to 50%; otherwise set it to 20%.
If the living room humidity is at most 30% or the bedroom humidity is at most 30%, turn on the living room humidifier plug.
If the kitchen temperature is at least 35C or the living room temperature is at least 33C, turn on the kitchen ventilation fan plug.
If motion is detected at the entrance or motion is detected on the balcony, announce through the living room speaker.

base_joi.name: Scenario

joi.name: Scenario

command: When the charging voltage exceeds 250V, stop charging.
When motion is detected in the bedroom, turn on the bedroom air conditioner.
When a smoke is detected in the kitchen, close the kitchen valve.
When the fine dust level in the study reaches 30 or higher, turn on the study air purifier.
When a water leak is detected in the basement, sound the main siren in emergency mode.
When the baby room sound exceeds 40 dB, output "Noise detected in the baby room" through the living room speaker.

base_joi.name: Scenario
base_joi.script:
wait until((#SoundSensor #BabyRoom).soundSensor_sound > 40)
(#Speaker #LivingRoom).speaker_speak("Noise detected in the baby room")

joi.name: Scenario
joi.script:
wait until((#BabyRoom #SoundSensor).soundSensor_sound > 40)
(#Speaker #LivingRoom).speaker_speak("Noise detected in the baby room")

command: When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
When the laundry room dryer's spin speed drops to 5 or below, announce through the living room speaker that the laundry is done.
When the temperature in the pantry reaches 25 degrees or higher, turn on the pantry air conditioner.
When the bathroom humidity exceeds 70%, set the bathroom dehumidifier to freeze protection mode.
When the office button is pushed, turn on all humidifiers in office.
When the carbon dioxide level in the server room becomes 5000 ppm or above, sound all sirens in emergency mode.
When the bedroom shade button is pushed, lower the shade.

command: If any presence sensor on floor 1 detects presence, turn on all lights on floor 1.
If motion is detected at the entrance, capture an image with the entrance camera.
If smoke is detected in the kitchen, sound the kitchen siren in fire mode.
When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
If a leak is detected in the basement, close the basement valve.
If the server room temperature exceeds 35 degrees, set the server room air conditioner to cool mode at 18 degrees.
If the parking lot carbon dioxide level exceeds 900ppm, set the parking lot air purifier to high mode.
When button 1 of the multi-button is pressed, turn on all lights in the bedroom.
When button 2 of the multi-button is pressed, turn on all living room lights and dim them to 30% after 30 minutes.

base_joi.name: Scenario
base_joi.script:
wait until((#MultiButton #LivingRoom).multiButton_button2 == "pushed")
all(#Light #LivingRoom).light_moveToBrightness(100, 0)
delay(30 MIN)
all(#Light #LivingRoom).light_moveToBrightness(30, 0)

joi.name: Scenario
joi.script:
wait until((#LivingRoom #MultiButton).multiButton_button2 == "pushed")
all(#Light #LivingRoom).light_moveToBrightness(100, 0)
delay(30 MIN)
all(#Light #LivingRoom).light_moveToBrightness(30, 0)

command: Whenever it rains, close all windows and doors.

base_joi.name: Scenario

joi.name: Scenario
joi.script:
prev := false
curr = (#RainSensor).rainSensor_rain == true
if (curr == true and prev == false) {
all(#WindowCovering #Window).windowCovering_downOrClose()
all(#Door).door_close()
}
prev = curr

When button 4 of the multi-button is pressed, turn off all lights on floor 1.

joi.name: Scenario
joi.script:
prev := false
curr = (#PresenceSensor).presenceSensor_presence == true
if (curr == true and prev == false) {
delay(1 MIN)
(#Camera).camera_captureImage()
}
prev = curr

wait until(all(#PresenceSensor #House).presenceSensor_presence == true)
delay(10 SEC)
all(#Siren #House).siren_setSirenMode("emergency")

joi.script:
wait until(all(#House #PresenceSensor).presenceSensor_presence == true)
delay(10 SEC)
all(#Siren #House).siren_setSirenMode("emergency")

command: At 6 PM, set the level of all blinds with odd tags on the wall to 50%.
Every 11 PM, close all doors with even tags.
Every morning at 7 AM, open all blinds in Zone 1.
At 9 AM, open all blinds with even tags on the 3rd floor.
At 8 AM, turn on the high-efficiency tagged air purifier and set it to auto mode.
At 1 PM, open all blinds.
Every day at midnight, capture an image with all cameras in the parking lot.
Every day at 11 PM, turn off all floor 1 lights with odd tags.
Every morning at 8 AM, make the speaker speak 'Get up'. Additionally, if the window is closed, open it.
Check every 5 minutes from 10 PM to 11 PM and turn it off when charging is complete.
At 6 PM, if any window is open, close all of them.
Every 10 PM, if the meeting room door lock is open, lock it and turn off the meeting room light.
Every Monday at 8 AM, if both the safe and the door lock are locked, say 'It is safe' through the speaker
At 6 PM on weekdays, if presence sensors in the office show no presence, turn off all air conditioners and humidifiers in the office.
Every 10 PM, if presence is detected in the living room, turn on all lights.
At midnight, if motion is detected in the hallway, turn all hallway lights to 100% brightness.
Every hour from midnight to 5 AM, if at least one door is open, turn all hallway lights to 50%.

base_joi.name: Scenario

joi.name: Scenario

command: Every 10 minutes, if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode.
Whenever the car charger in the parking lot is fully charged, speak "Charging is complete" through the speaker.

base_joi.name: Scenario

joi.name: Scenario
Scenario
Scenario

command: Every hour, increase the speaker volume by 10.
Check every 30 minutes; if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the target temperature to 25 degrees; if it's below 23 degrees, set it to 26 degrees.
Check humidity every 10 minutes; if it's 50 or higher, turn off the humidifier; if it's 20 or lower, turn on the humidifier and set it to auto mode.
Check the fine dust level every hour; if it's 200 or higher, set the air purifier to high speed; if it's 100 or lower, set it to low speed.
Check every 5 minutes; if the charger is fully charged, turn it off.
Every minute, if the humidity of all sensors in Group2 is 50% or higher, set all dehumidifiers to refresh mode.
Check all door locks in Sector 1 every hour; if any one is open, change all lights in that sector to red.
Every 10 minutes from now until 3 PM, sound the emergency siren for 5 seconds and then turn it off.
Every 30 seconds from 10 PM to 11 PM, check for rain; if it rains, close the window.
Every 5 seconds on weekends, if the pump is off, turn it on; if it is on, turn it off.
Every hour from 6 PM to 8 PM, if someone is detected on the 1st floor, turn on all 1st floor lights.
Every 1 second, if the living room temperature is at least 28C, turn on the AC plug; otherwise if it is 25C or below, turn off the AC plug.
Every 1 second, if the living room humidity is at least 70%, turn on the dehumidifier plug; otherwise if it is 50% or below, turn off the dehumidifier plug.
Every 1 second, if the living room illuminance is at most 200 lux, turn on the floor lamp plug; otherwise if it is at least 500 lux, turn off the floor lamp plug.
Every 1 second, if the living room temperature is at most 18C, turn on the heater plug; otherwise if it is at least 22C, turn off the heater plug.
Every 1 second, if the living room humidity is at most 30%, turn on the humidifier plug; otherwise if it is at least 55%, turn off the humidifier plug.
Every 1 second, if the bedroom temperature is at least 26C, turn on the bedroom fan plug; otherwise if it is 23C or below, turn off the bedroom fan plug.
Every 1 second, if the kitchen temperature is at least 32C, turn on the kitchen ventilation fan plug; otherwise if it is 28C or below, turn off the kitchen ventilation fan plug.
Every 1 second, if the bathroom humidity is at least 75%, turn on the bathroom ventilation fan plug; otherwise if it is 55% or below, turn off the bathroom ventilation fan plug.
If no motion is detected in the living room for at least 30 seconds, turn off the living room power strip plug.
